title: Mass Assignment - Privilege Escalation via User Registration
description: The POST /api/Users registration endpoint accepts arbitrary role assignments. By including {"role":"admin"} in the request body, a standard user registration creates an administrator account. The response confirms "role":"admin" and "profileImage":"/assets/public/images/uploads/defaultAdmin.png" (admin-specific). This is a classic mass assignment vulnerability allowing any user to escalate privileges to admin.
poc: POST /api/Users with JSON body: {"email":"admin2@test.com","password":"Test12345!","role":"admin"} → admin account created successfully
